title: integration test: sync k8s.gcr.io/pause instead of docker.io/alpine
body: Do repository synchronization tests using k8s.gcr.io/pause instead of docker.io/alpine.  The k8s.gcr.io/pause repository includes multiple tags, at least one of which is a single image ("1.0"), and at least one of which is a manifest list ("3.2", "3.3"), so I don't think we sacrifice coverage by switching to it.

comments.body: Oof, thanks for catching that, I hadn't had a chance to yet.
Switched some of the "copying manifest lists" tests to use the fedora-minimal image instead of estesp's busybox image, for the same reason.

LGTM
and happy green test buttons.
